weather_agent.name: Stella
weather_agent.help_text:
Hi! 👋 I'm {name}, your virtual weather assistant! 🤖

I saw and read your email, 📨 but I only understand a specific message format. ⚙️

To get the current weather ☀️ for your city, in your language, send me a message:

{
  "location": "London",
  "lang": "en"
}

To get a 3-day weather forecast, 🗓️ send:

{
  "location": "London",
  "lang": "en",
  "mode": "forecast"
}

For a full 5-day forecast 📊 including temperature, 🌡️ wind, 💨 precipitation, 🌧️ UV, 🕶️ sunrise/sunset, 🌅 send:

{
  "location": "London",
  "lang": "en",
  "mode": "all"
}

The "lang" field is optional, by default I will use English.
Supported languages: en, zh, hi, es, ar, fr, bn, pt, ru, id

I will process the first valid json request I find, everything else will be ignored.

Bye! Your {name}.

reply_templates.name: Правила общения для получения погоды, русский
